title: centaurea longifimbriata
intro: Centaurea longifimbriata, also known as the long-fimbriated knapweed, is a flowering plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Centaurea longifimbriata is often used as a dried herb or infused in teas, capsules, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
